snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public and documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code, and shared executable schemas. Focused automated gates execute current implementation and test evidence on every run.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review audited the exact 14-Development plus 8-pre-recipe-governed candidate. It verified exact build-only builder/ASAR pins and integrities, runtime-SBOM exclusion, truthful unsigned macOS arm64 packageability scope, unchanged planned release states, explicit residual release gaps, the 1,108-claim lock, current-only Owners, and fixed budgets. It reported CLEAR on all five dimensions and made no file edits.

dimensions.summary: Packageability uses existing Release, Technical, Quality, Playbook and acceptance owners; no document, user destination or lifecycle surface is added.
Owners and machine manifests agree on exact builder/ASAR pins, build-only authority, runtime-SBOM exclusion, unsigned preflight scope and remaining release requirements.
The 1,108-claim ledger binds only four narrowed planned targets; all 10 phase, 99 Requirement and 97 Exit status values remain unchanged.
The workflow, package configuration, report boundary, dependency records, exact update gates and remaining supported-platform work are directly discoverable.
No Markdown file was added; 55 documents, 3,385 of 3,700 entry words and 1,115,813 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes remain within ratcheted budgets.

verification.evidence: The final exact candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, 51 dependency records with zero waivers, fixtures, Pi/import boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five quality dimensions.

The unchanged 14-path Development aggregate 9ac112f94d18b6c5d007770a003c273c4bba7878b2c54c1eaab3750cbd186594 passed 81 files and 848 tests, typecheck, production build, source smokes, macOS arm64 packaging, packaged smoke and npm audit with zero vulnerabilities.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 55 Markdown files, 3,385 of 3,700 entry words, 4,522 trace lines, 224,922 of 250,000 trace bytes and 1,115,813 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes.
The reviewed 108-file snapshot is 5fc0993a6ef68bd0e3e4cbbdf147ba3845329aa04fe62e1dca2f16638e2f388b; the lock contains 1,108 claims and all phase, Requirement and Exit statuses are unchanged.

coordination.compatibility: This candidate adds an unsigned macOS arm64 packageability preflight and exact build-only release dependencies. It does not claim Public Alpha readiness, alter runtime data or permission behavior, or change any phase, Requirement or Exit status.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze 14 exact paths; Product Planning added eight governed paths plus this current-only recipe; independent review cleared the bounded projection and retained all supported-platform and release-hardening gaps.

nonBlockingRisks: The generated packageability report is workflow/local-run evidence and is not committed in this reviewed worktree; governance validates its recipe and bounded contract, not a stored packaged binary.
The artifact is unsigned and unnotarized; nested-helper signing, hardened runtime, notarization and installed signed-app proof remain required.
Only macOS 26 arm64 packageability is covered; macOS x64 and supported Windows packaging and runtime parity remain open.
DMG/NSIS installers, update metadata and alpha-to-alpha update behavior are not implemented or evidenced.
Packaged idle/ordinary memory, post-heavy-Job recovery and 10,000-page/100,000-chunk scale reports remain open.
Git, Bun, uv and PaddleOCR are absent from this packageability artifact and are reported as missing rather than silently claimed bundled.
Release notes, final supported-platform attribution review and manual signed installed-platform acceptance remain open.
